empty_no_model_body: Go to the Models tab to select a band and character.
model_select_band_subtitle: Swipe to select a band; the character list updates automatically
settings_live2d_desc: These options take effect immediately and are saved automatically.
settings_vsync_on: Match screen refresh rate to reduce tearing.
settings_vsync_off: When off, only the FPS limit applies.
settings_gaze_on: When clicking the Live2D or wallpaper, the model looks toward the touch point.
settings_gaze_off: When off, clicks only trigger motion feedback.
settings_bg_selected: Photo selected, applied to Live2D preview only.
settings_theme_desc: Control the app's color scheme and appearance. Changes apply immediately.
settings_dynamic_color_on: Extract colors from your system wallpaper.
settings_dynamic_color_off: Use the default pink theme when off.
settings_dark_mode_system_desc: Switch automatically based on system settings.
settings_floating_desc: Add multiple Live2D models as desktop floating windows. When locked, drag and pinch-to-zoom are disabled; when touch-through is on, clicks pass through to the app below.
settings_floating_permission_desc: Allow display over other apps is required to create floating windows.
settings_floating_no_items: Add at least one model first.
settings_floating_enable_desc: Shows the models listed below when enabled.
settings_floating_lock_on: Floating windows cannot be dragged or zoomed.
settings_floating_lock_off: Drag with one finger or pinch-to-zoom is allowed.
settings_floating_touch_on: Clicks pass through to underlying apps; the model itself does not respond to touch.
settings_floating_touch_off: Floating windows accept touch events normally.
settings_floating_no_model: First select a Live2D model in the Models tab.
settings_floating_reset_desc: Move all floating windows back to their default positions while keeping current sizes.
settings_floating_empty: No floating window models. Added windows remember their last position and size.
settings_wallpaper_desc: Desktop rendering uses the currently selected Live2D model. Only tap interactions are supported on the desktop; adjust the position here.
settings_wallpaper_enable_on: Live wallpaper rendering enabled. You still need to select Bandori Pet wallpaper in the system picker.
settings_wallpaper_enable_off: When off, rendering will not start even if Bandori Pet is set as the wallpaper.
settings_wallpaper_adjust_desc: After entering full-screen, drag with one finger and pinch-to-zoom. Save to apply to the desktop wallpaper.
settings_wallpaper_bg_selected: Photo selected, applied to desktop wallpaper only.
settings_about_text: Bandori Pet Android. Tap the Live2D display area to cycle through model motions. This project is released under the GPLv3 license.
wallpaper_no_model_desc: First select a Live2D model in the Models tab.
wallpaper_adjust_desc: Drag with one finger, pinch-to-zoom. Save to apply to the desktop wallpaper.
